attributes.action: The NHS should charge all without a valid NI number for treatment in the UK.
attributes.additional_details: We hear all the time the NHS is broken, then fix it by introducing this strategy. The amount of money the NHS will generate will elevate a lot of cash flow problems. If I go overseas I need insurance so why should we be any different. I’ll tell you why, we lake the backbone to do anything about it. We are more interested in what people think! With the income generated our doctors and nurses may be able to afford a better living standards, more ambulances, more mental health support. Need I go on.
attributes.background: Any foreign national or individual without a valid UK National Insurance number should pay for treatment delivered by the NHS. We need to stop tourism holiday treatment. I’ve witnessed foreign nationals arriving with there baggage, receiving treatment and going back to their country of origin.

rejection.details: Require a National Insurance number to access any NHS treatment: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752138
